name: Init
sig: public void Init(Dictionary<string, Flipbook> flipbooks)

sig: private void DisposeAllVariants()
summary: Dispose all baked per-variant wake particle textures.

name: BakeAllVariants
sig: private void BakeAllVariants()
mechanism: loop over tints, delegates to bakegradienttexture

summary: Blend a base particle color toward a water tint by an influence factor.

name: LookupVariantForPos
sig: private byte LookupVariantForPos(Vec2 pos)
summary: Pick the baked texture variant index matching the water tint at a position.

name: BakeGradientTexture
sig: private static Texture2D? BakeGradientTexture(Flipbook? fb)
mechanism: delegates to overload with default colors
summary: Bake a default-tinted gradient texture from a flipbook's grayscale source.

name: BakeGradientTexture
sig: private static Texture2D? BakeGradientTexture(Flipbook? fb, Color shadowColor, Color foamColor)
mechanism: two-pass pixel scan and gradient remap
summary: Bake a gradient-colored copy of a grayscale flipbook texture between two colors.

sig: public void Clear()
summary: Clear all per-unit wake particle state.

private static void SpawnTrail(

        Vec2 bodyHalf,
        byte variantIdx)

private static void SpawnBowWave(

        Vec2 bodyHalf,
        byte variantIdx)
mechanism: random spread spawn ahead of unit

private static void StartEntrySplash(

        Vec2 bodyHalf,

sig:
private static void TrickleEntrySplash(
        WakeEmitterState state, float dt,

        Vec2 bodyHalf,
        byte variantIdx

private static void EmitSplashParticles(

name: StartExitSplash

private static void StartExitSplash(

        Vec2 bodyHalf,

private static void TrickleExitSplash(

        byte variantIdx)

        Vec2 bodyHalf,
